name: openaq-mcp-server
description: Find air-quality monitoring stations and read measured pollutant observations (PM2.5, PM10, O3, NO2, SO2, CO, and more) from government monitors worldwide via the OpenAQ v3 API, with DataCanvas SQL over historical series.

OPENAQ_API_KEY.title: OpenAQ API key
OPENAQ_API_KEY.description: OpenAQ v3 API key, sent as the X-API-Key header. Free from openaq.org.

CANVAS_PROVIDER_TYPE.title: DataCanvas provider
CANVAS_PROVIDER_TYPE.description: Set to 'duckdb' to enable SQL analysis over large measurement series. Leave as 'none' to disable.
